raw_comment:
What do you notice?
That in the national and women's national basketball league it has had the same percentage of Players of color for 2 years. I have also noticed that there is a greater amount of players of color than head coaches. 
 
What do you wonder?
I wonder, how do the percentages have a huge difference
Can this data be applied internationally? 
How are these scores compared to other sports, like tennis or track? 
 
What impact does this have on you and your community?
This impacts the community, as there is a lack of diversity when it comes to the coaches. Looking at the statistics, there are already many people of color who are players but not a lot when it comes to being coaches. Since there are little head coaches of color, it could make kids discouraged to achieve their dreams of becoming a head coach for these sports. 

What’s going on in this graph? Write a catchy headline that captures the graph’s main idea.
Statistics show the truth of the diversity in these Major League sports.
ace_sentences: In the national basketball league, it has had the same percentage of players of color for 2 years.
In the women's national basketball league, it has had the same percentage of players of color for 2 years.
There is a greater amount of players of color than head coaches.
I wonder how the percentages have a huge difference.
I wonder if this data can be applied internationally.
I wonder how these scores are compared to other sports.
There is a lack of diversity when it comes to the coaches.
Looking at the statistics, there are already many people of color who are players.
Looking at the statistics, there are not a lot of people of color when it comes to being coaches.
There are little head coaches of color.
If there are little head coaches of color, then it could make kids discouraged to achieve their dreams.
Some kids have dreams of becoming a head coach for these sports.
Statistics show the truth of the diversity in these Major League sports.
